pkmn.lore: Bound by weight and limit, a shape space itself can sustain. Its power yet governs distance and separation, though restrained, for the world cannot bear the weight of infinite breadth given form.

hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5

common.lore: The cold of winter. Air chills and frost gathers in its wake. Snowfall follows as it passes, and mountains are left sealed in ice where it lingers.

hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
